2603.25692.title: A Unified Memory Perspective for Probabilistic Trustworthy AI
2603.25692.paper_summary: Trustworthy artificial intelligence increasingly relies on probabilistic computation to achieve robustness, interpretability, security and privacy. In practical systems, such workloads interleave deterministic data access with repeated stochastic sampling across models, data paths and system functions, shifting performance bottlenecks from arithmetic units to memory systems that must deliver both data and randomness. Here we present a unified data-access perspective in which deterministic access is treated as a limiting case of stochastic sampling, enabling both modes to be analyzed within a common framework. This view reveals that increasing stochastic demand reduces effective data-access efficiency and can drive systems into entropy-limited operation. Based on this insight, we define memory-level evaluation criteria, including unified operation, distribution programmability, efficiency, robustness to hardware non-idealities and parallel compatibility. Using these criteria, we analyze limitations of conventional architectures and examine emerging probabilistic compute-in-memory approaches that integrate sampling with memory access, outlining pathways toward scalable hardware for trustworthy AI.
2603.25692.paper_summary_zh: 可信的人工智慧越來越依賴概率計算來實現穩健性、可解釋性、安全性和隱私。在實際系統中，這些工作負載將確定性數據訪問與跨模型、數據路徑和系統功能的重複隨機抽樣交錯，將性能瓶頸從算術單元轉移到必須同時提供數據和隨機性的記憶體系統。在這裡，我們提出了一種統一的數據訪問觀點，其中確定性訪問被視為隨機抽樣的一個極限情況，使得這兩種模式可以在共同的框架內進行分析。這一觀點揭示了增加的隨機需求會降低有效的數據訪問效率，並可能使系統陷入熵限制的運行。基於這一見解，我們定義了記憶體級別的評估標準，包括統一操作、分佈可編程性、效率、對硬體非理想性的穩健性和並行兼容性。利用這些標準，我們分析了傳統架構的限制，並檢視了新興的概率計算內存方法，這些方法將抽樣與記憶體訪問整合，概述了邁向可擴展硬體以實現可信AI的途徑。
2603.25692.author: Xueji Zhao et.al.
2603.25692.authors: Xueji Zhao, Likai Pei, Jianbo Liu, Kai Ni, Ningyuan Cao
